articles.headline: McFarlane: Chelsea start 'not acceptable' in Forest defeat
articles.description: Calum McFarlane reacts to Chelsea's "disappointing" 3-1 loss to Nottingham Forest to mark their sixth straight Premier League defeat.

articles.headline: Coventry fans serenade Frank Lampard: 'Sign the contract'
articles.description: Frank Lampard was serenaded with chants of "sign the contract" as an estimated 50,000 Coventry City supporters flocked to War Memorial Park to celebrate their long-awaited return to the Premier League.

articles.headline: New position for Lewis-Skelly? Henry analyses teen's 'outstanding' performance vs Fulham
articles.description: Speaking on Monday Night Football Thierry Henry analyses Myles Lewis Skelly's outstanding midfield performance against Fulham.

articles.headline: Hearts edge closer to historic title with comeback win over Rangers
articles.description: Captain Lawrence Shankland kept Hearts firmly on course for Scottish Premiership glory as they all but eliminated one of their two main rivals from contention by coming from behind to defeat Rangers 2-1 at a frenzied Tynecastle.

articles.headline: Chelsea's season of gloom hits new low in home defeat to resurgent Forest
articles.description: The Blues were thrashed at home by a second-string Nottingham Forest side to fall to their sixth successive defeat in the Premier League.

articles.headline: Hutchison questions Chelsea's motivation after Forest defeat
articles.description: Don Hutchison wonders if Chelsea's players are fully focused after a sixth straight Premier League defeat at the hands of Nottingham Forest.

articles.headline: 'We aren't kids,' Virgil Van Dijk said after questions over Liverpool holiday time
articles.description: Virgil van Dijk was left frustrated by Liverpool's loss to arch-rivals Manchester United and responded with bemusement to the suggestion excess holiday time may have contributed to what he calls an "unacceptable" season.

articles.headline: Carra: Chelsea look like a broken club
articles.description: Chelsea look like a broken club, according to Sky Sports pundit Jamie Carragher.

articles.headline: Chelsea hit new low with sixth straight league defeat as Forest take step closer to safety
articles.description: Chelsea fell to their sixth straight defeat in the Premier League at home to Nottingham Forest.

articles.headline: Forest hand Chelsea sixth straight PL defeat and move six clear of drop zone
articles.description: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Chelsea’s match against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

articles.headline: Forest boost Premier League survival chances by stunning woeful Chelsea
articles.description: Nottingham Forest stunned woeful Chelsea 3-1 at Stamford Bridge to go six points clear of the Premier League relegation zone and send a warning shot to Aston Villa ahead of Thursday's Europa League semi-final second leg.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Arsenal eye PSG's Barcola
articles.description: Paris Saint-Germain forward Bradley Barcola has Liverpool and Arsenal interested. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Why central midfielders are this summer's biggest transfer trend
articles.description: The most in-demand players this summer all have one thing in common: They are the best available central midfielders.

articles.headline: Man United clinch Champions League spot, Inter win Serie A, Saka stars for Arsenal
articles.description: Man United clinched a return to Champions League action by beating Liverpool; does this guarantee Michael Carrick gets the permanent job? Plus: Inter Milan win Serie A, and Arsenal get a boost from Bukayo Saka in their title race.

articles.headline: Clarke 'more or less' set on World Cup squad but undecided over two positions
articles.description: Scotland head coach Steve Clarke has revealed he remains "undecided" over two positions in his World Cup squad.

articles.headline: Laurens can't understand why Liverpool would stick with Slot
articles.description: Julien Laurens explains why he doesn't see Liverpool getting back to their best under Arne Slot.

articles.headline: Michael Carrick has the Sir Alex Ferguson-era Man United 'magic' - Mateus Cunha
articles.description: Matheus Cunha believes Michael Carrick deserves to stay as Manchester United head coach having brought some of Sir Alex Ferguson's magic back to Old Trafford.

articles.headline: Rio Ferdinand and Jamie Carragher trade barbs on social media
articles.description: Former England teammates Rio Ferdinand and Jamie Carragher are at war with each other on social media.i

articles.headline: Everton vs Manchester City in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Everton and Manchester City.

articles.headline: Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Nottingham Forest.

articles.headline: Could Bruno Fernandes break long-standing Premier League assist record?
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes is on the verge of equalling the record for the most assists registered in a single Premier League season.

articles.headline: The earliest dates Arsenal or Man City could win the Premier League title
articles.description: The Premier League title race between Manchester City and Arsenal is set to go right down to the wire. But when could either side win it earliest?

articles.headline: Premier League players out of contract: Who could leave your team on a free this summer?
articles.description: ESPN takes a look at the players who are out of contract in 2026 across all 20 Premier League clubs.

articles.headline: Arsenal and Man City's remaining Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
articles.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.

articles.headline: From crisis to PL survival belief, Roberto De Zerbi sparks Tottenham reawakening in crucial Aston Villa win
articles.description: Tottenham are out of the relegation zone, and the relief was palpable at Villa Park. ESPN's Aiman Khalid reports from a big win for Spurs, and new boss Roberto De Zerbi.

articles.headline: Five times Arsenal have let the Premier League title slip away
articles.description: Arsenal's quest for their first Premier League title since the Invincibles' famous triumph in 2003-04 has recently threatened to veer of course.

articles.headline: Are Tottenham going to be relegated from the Premier League? What stats, charts say
articles.description: For Tottenham fans, the team's nosedive into the relegation zone has forced them to think the unthinkable - are they really going to go down?

articles.headline: Pep Guardiola says he still has 'incredible energy' amid title race and potential treble
articles.description: Pep Guardiola said he still has "incredible energy" for his job at Manchester City -- and feels calmer despite the pressures of a treble challenge.

articles.headline: Roberto De Zerbi: Spurs have '12 players' with Conor Gallagher
articles.description: BIRMINGHAM -- Tottenham boss Roberto De Zerbi said he has "twelve players" on the pitch when Conor Gallagher is on song after the midfielder scored a crucial goal in Spurs' 2-1 win over Aston Villa on Sunday.

articles.headline: Spurs beat Villa put pressure back on West Ham
articles.description: Goals from Conor Gallagher and Richarlison give Spurs a much needed win as they leapfrog West Ham in the Premier League table.

articles.headline: Man United sneak past Liverpool at Old Trafford
articles.description: Handball or no handball? Benjamin Sesko's goal becomes the big talking point as Manchester United defeat the Reds.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Inter Miami aim to pair Casemiro with Messi
articles.description: Casemiro could be the latest star to join Lionel Messi at Inter Miami. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Nicol: Saka could win Arsenal the Premier League title
articles.description: Steve Nicol says the return of Bukayo Saka to the Arsenal squad could win them the Premier League title.

articles.headline: Nicol: Spurs won't go down if they play like they did vs. Villa
articles.description: The ESPN FC team discusses Tottenham Hotspur's performance against Aston Villa in their Premier League clash, breaking down what Spurs must do to avoid relegation.

articles.headline: Nicol: Liverpool look 'absolutely lost' under Arne Slot
articles.description: Steve Nicol slams Liverpool's 3-2 defeat to Manchester United and suggests Xabi Alonso as a replacement for Arne Slot.

articles.headline: Burley: Man Utd should give Iraola the permanent role
articles.description: Craig Burley gives his opinion on who Manchester United should hire as their permanent manager despite Michael Carrick's success as interim boss.
